Chutzpah Skills Most chutzpah skills are used when a character wants. something from another character — bootlicking when grovelling to a superior, intercogation when torturing a cap- tive, and so on, These skills can only be used against -nonsplayer characters; a player character's bootlicking skill roll has no effect ‘on another player character.
